title: Question Text
documentation:
## Purpose
A single natural-language question to be answered, evaluated, or routed by a machine. Suitable for Q&A, classification, and decision machines that process one question at a time.

## When to use
Use `media:question;textable` for single-question inputs. When processing multiple questions in bulk, use the companion `media:list;question;textable` type, which carries one question per line.

## Notes
Length is constrained to 5–4096 characters. See [Question List](https://capdag.com/browse/media:list;question;textable) for batch inputs and [Decision](https://capdag.com/browse/media:decision;json;record;textable) for the corresponding output type.
